titleStmt.title: SII 20.154: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 154. (B.K. No. 42 of 1936-37.) KAḌLĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Śivaliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1094, Nandana, Pushya, śu. 8, Monday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1172, December 24. The week-day was, however, Sunday.

The inscription states that Daṇḍanāyaka Kumāra Bammidēvarasa who was administering Sagara, Hagariṭṭage and Eḷamēla, divisions and Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṁgidēvarasa of Eḷamēla visited the temple of Svayambhū Sōmanāthadēva at the ghatikāsthāna Kaḍalevāḍa and made a gift of land for worship, offering and the feeding of the ascetics in the temple. The gift was entrusted to āchārya Sōvarāśi-paṇḍitadēva who, in his turn, made some gift of land to his son (putra) Saṁgōja who is called an architect (sūtradhāri) and an expert in building.
The king is stated to have been ruling from Seleyahaḷḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī gurubhyō namaḥ Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśira(ḥ)stuṁbicaṁdra cāmaracāravē .
traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē © svasti samastabhu
vanāśraya śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁja rapura
varādhīśvaraṁ suva(ṁ)rṇnadhra śabhadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyanirghōRead�
śaṇaṁ samaravibīṣaṇaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḻakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kadanapracaṇḍa
mānakanakācaḷaṁ vairikāḷānaḷaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ parākramabhīmaṁ śaraṇāga
tavajrapaṁjaraṁ vairidikkuṁjaraṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ śrīmatkaḷacuryya cakravartti
rāyamurāri bhujabaḷamalla sōvidēvara vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛ
ddhipravardhdhamānamācaṁdrārkratāraṁbaraṁ seleyahaḷḷiya nelevīḍi
noḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷo
ḷnegaḷtevettarddaneṁtene © kuladoḷ hermmeyoḷarmminoḷvibhavadoḷsaddharmmado
ḷsatyadoḷ caladoḷkūrppinoḷārppinoḷnijabhujāvaṣṭaṁbhadoḷ dhairyyadoḷ balado
ḷtējadoḷūrjjitōṁnatikeyoḷsatkīrttiyoḷmūrttiyoḷ kali daṇḍā
dhipa bammidēvana sahasrāṁsakke vappaṁnarār . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati lāḻakhaṇḍeyakāṟaradhi(ḥ)ṣṭhāyakanaṇu
gasāhaṇādhipati mahāpasāytaṁ yaribirudamaṇḍaḷika sarabhabhēruṇḍa nu
ḍidante gaṇḍa vīramārttaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa giridurggamalla ripuhrideyasella malevaraṁ
kolva śaraṇene kāvaṁ śrīmanmahāpracaṇḍadaṁḍanāyakaṁ kumāraṁ bammidēvarasar ta(ṁ)
mmāḷkeya sagara hagariṭṭage yeḷamēlanāḍumaṁ nōḍuttaṁ bandu . © svasti samadhi gatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tagaranagarādhīśvaraṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ sauryya
raghujātaṁ śrī śiḷāhāranarēṁdra vibhavāmarēṁdra ḍaṁgārabhērīnirgghōṣaṇaṁ
samaravibhīṣaṇaṁ vidagdhamugdhāṁganāhrideyakusmakōdaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa ceṁnamanneya paṁnega
vainatēyaṁ virōdhimaṁneyatārakāsurakārttikēya viṣamahayaprauḍharēkhārē
vantaṁ vijayalakṣmīkāntaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ kātyāyinīlabdha varapra
sādaṁ sahajamrigāmōdanāḷiṁ muṁniṟivaṁ sauryyavaṁ meṟevaṁ baṁṭara bā
vaṁ maṟevuge kāvaṁ sōmanaṁkakāṟaṁ raṇaraṁganīṟaṁ nijada beḍaṁga sāhasōttuṁgaṁ śrīma
duttarēśvaradēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanma hāmaṁ
ḍaḷēśvaraṁ Eḷamēla siṁgidēvarasar pramukhavāgi nāḍa grāmānugrāmagaḷa prabhu gāpuṁḍu(ṁ)gaḷu moda
lāgi prajeyaṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷsi sthānamānyaṁgaḷaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi parirakṣisutta sukhadinirdoṁdu
devasaṁ lōkavikhyātavāgirdda ghaṭikāsthānaṁ kaḍalevāḍada śrī svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvadarśana tadarttha dharmmabu
ddhiyiṁ bappalliyadentirddudeṁdaḍe śrīmattraiḷōkyarakṣāmaṇiyappa Īśvarana tripurada hanasamaya
doḷu lalāṭagharmmabiṁduviṁ dharegavatarsi marttyalōkada sakaḷajanaṁgaḷ snāna sēvaneyiṁ
danēkajanmāṁtaraduritanivāraṇaṁ māḍalvēḍi yanēkabhaṁguratarattaraṁgavītitsyāye yāReadvīcicchāye.
gi pūrvvābhimukhamāda śrīmanmahābhīmarathīnadiya dakṣiṇatīradoḷativipuḷagi
rinikaraparivṟitanirjharapravāhapūtaśrōtapuṇyāraṇyapuḷiṇataṭāśramaṁgaḷoḷagastyama
hāmunimodalādanēkasiddhacāraṇamunijanaṁgaḷugrōgravīraghōrabrataniyamaṁgaḷiṁ vātāṁ
buparṇnāsanarāgirppa tāpasarumaṁ tāpasāśramaṁgaḷaṁ mecci manadegoṁḍu dēvādhidēvaṁ krīḍāvinōda
diṁ nelasuvartthiyiṁ śrī svayaṁbhuvāgi puṇyakṣētradoḷu prasannamūrttiyāguda
ysirdda śrī sōmanāthadēvara purōvarggaṁ kaḍalevāḍavesaroḷatīva ramyavā
girddudalli . Adaṟa puradoḷage celviṁ madanana sadanadavoleseva citragrahaṁgaḷa tri
daśāṁganeyaranīḷisuva sudatiyarire dēvalōkamippaṁtirkkuṁ . Antā sakaḷalōka
da celvellamanoṁdeḍege teraḷcidantativicitravāgi nirmmisi dharāvibhāgadoḷnilsidantati ramaṇīya
vāgi māḍsida trikūṭada dēvatābhavanamanalliyācāryyaru sōvarāsipaṁḍitadēvaru māḷpa ni
tyanēmada trikālārccanāḷaṁkāramumanalliyaha(ṁ)rṇniśaṁ koṁḍāḍuva māhēśvara gaṇaṁgaḷmanā purō
varggamumaṁ mahāpu(ṁ)ṇyanadītīradalu prakhyātavāgirdda dharmmabhūmiyaṁ śrī manmahāpradhā
naṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ kumāra bammidēvarasar kaṁḍu hriṣṭapuṣṭarāgi Ī sthaḷadoḷēnaṁ māḍidoḍama
kṣayaphalameṁbudaṁ dharmaśāstraṁgaḷiṁ tiḷidu Ī dēvara viniyōgakke tamma hesara dharmma vāgi na
ḍevantāgi bhūmiyaṁ parikalpisi kuḍavēḷkuveṁdu vīravene hiḍiva dharmmamene biḍuvaṁ tyāgakke kalpa
vrikṣavenisirdda śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ Eḷamēla siṁgidēvarasanuṁ tānuṁ Ēkabhāvadiṁ sumanassarā
gi sakanripābdaṁ 1094 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada puśya suddha 8 sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti vyatīpā
taṁ kūḍidalli kaḍalevāḍada śrī svayaṁbhusōmanāthadēvargge munna kasapayyanāya kanuṁ
siṁgadēvarasaṁge koṭṭa bhūmiyoḷagāgi mūḍalā dēvavaḷḷi seṁbevāḍada paḍuvaṇa sīme mūḍa
lāgi teṁkalu kumaseya prabhumānyaṁ mēre paḍuvalu dēvaṇagāveya sīme baḍagalā sīmeya
hiṭṭanottuguṭṭa kaḍalevāḍada pūrvvada catuḥsīmāghāṭadoḷage nidhinidhānanikṣēpataru patha
māḷāvrikṣajalapāśāṇasahita tribhōgābhyantaravādiyāgi koṭṭa sthaḷavrittiyutpa
ttiyiṁ dēvara viniyōgaventeṁdaḍe trikālārccanāḷaṁkāra mahānaivēdyakkaṁ karppūra
tāṁbūḷakuṁkumacaṁdanānulēpanakkaṁ gītavādyanrityakkaṁ caitrapavitrārōpaṇakkaṁ khaṁḍa
sphuṭitajīrṇnōddhāra sōtesuṇna māṭakūṭakkaṁ tapōdhanaraśanāttsyā(cchā)danakkavā caṁdrārkkasthāyi
yāgi yamaniyamāsanaprāṇāyāmapratyāhāradhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāna
japasamādhiśīlaguṇasaṁpannaruṁ vibudhajanamanōtsitaphaḷasamutpannaruṁ dīnānāthajaṭha radā
vapāvakanivāraṇaruṁ duritamadagajanivāraṇaruṁ nijasameyaśaraṇaykarakṣadakṣaruṁ Antana
varatasubhikṣaruṁ paṇḍitacūḍāmaṇiyuṁ siṣṭajanacintāmaṇiyuṁ Ityādi nāmāvaḷī virājita
rumappa śrīmadalliyācāryyaru sōvarāsipaṇḍitadēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru ©
gōcarmmamātrabhūmiya bhūcakradoḷittavargge svarggaphalaṁ tānā carmma māridaṁ
daṁdinā carmmāntarada sasiya bērggaḷa pavaṇi . barevaṁ brahmaṁ kaḍitaṁ dhare baḷapaṁ himagirīṁdravādoḍa
vēnuṁ nirutaṁ lekkisaneṟigume paramana muṁdomme māḷva bhōgada phaḷamaṁ . Ida rakṣipaṁge sāśvata padaviga
ḷidirgoḷguvidaṟoḷanneyaṁ māḍuvavaṁgodavida rauravanarakada puḷgaḷoḷarddikku ka lpakōṭi sa
hasraṁ . © śrīmadalliyācāryyaru sōvarāsipaṇḍitadēvaru tamma putra śrī sōma nāthadēva
pādārādhakaṁ sarasvatīdēvīlabdhaprasādaṁ prāsādamāṭakūṭapravīṇanappa
sūtradhāri saṁgōjaṁgeyalliya dasavaṁda keymanippattu kayya nivēśanavippattu
mattaru keyyuṁ manōjikeya vrittiyāgi yācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi bi
ṭṭaru © svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . śrīgurubhyō namaḥ © ©
Digital edition of SII 20.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
